name: Walnut Oil Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup rich chicken stock or shellfish stock
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the walnut oil, garlic, stock, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and vinegar.
2. Blend until fully combined and creamy.
3. Transfer to a bowl.
4. Whisk in the herbs and add salt and pepper to taste.
5. Store the vinaigrette, covered and refrigerated, for up to 3 days. Bring to room temperature before using.
Yield: 3/4 cup
